name: v2api-infinite-canvas
description: Operate image.v2api.top Infinite Canvas from Codex through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codex to operate image.v2api.top Infinite Canvas.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the image.v2api.top Infinite Canvas through a local MCP bridge. Codex can read canvas state, create text/config nodes, build image or video generation flows, connect nodes, and trigger generation while the web canvas remains the visual workspace.
defaultPrompt: 打开我的 V2API 无限画布。
读取当前画布并帮我创建一个电商宣传场景。
在画布里创建一个生视频流程。
